steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "9969"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('9', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('9', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('9', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Venus" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "Manicure" service
When I add the "Manicure" service to my cart
And I select the "GIFT CARD" category
And I add the "Shampoo" service to my cart
And I add the "Gift card $100" service to my cart
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Activate Gift Card $100.00"
And I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the number card "2222" visible
When I click on the "ADD ON" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the service "Gift card $100 (2222)" in my cart
And I should see my cart showing 3 item added
When I click on the total price of "Manicure"
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
And I click on the element with id "payment"
And I select the "Credit" payment type
And I fill the last 4 digits of card number "1234"
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the PAYROLL page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the "Payroll" screen
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the Payroll Date default to today
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Payroll Date' }).locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the technician name "Venus" in the employee view
And I should see the payroll type "Commission" in the employee view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Payroll Type' }).locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toHaveText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Payroll Type' }).locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the # of Work Days "1" in the employee view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: '# of Work Days' }).locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toHaveText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: '# of Work Days' }).locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the text "Sale Summary" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Sale Summary' })
And I should see the first Total "$115.70" in the single payroll view
And I should see the detail "Product: $50.00" in the single payroll view
And I should see the detail "Service: $65.70" in the single payroll view
And I should see the second Total "($3.00)" in the single payroll view
And I should see the detail "Item Discount: $0.00" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Item Discount:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Item Discount:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Ticket Discount: $0.00" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Ticket Discount:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Ticket Discount:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Item Supply Fee: ($2.00)" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Item Supply Fee:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Item Supply Fee:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Ticket Supply Fee: ($1.00)	" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Ticket Supply Fee:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Ticket Supply Fee:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Loyalty Redemption: $0.00" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Loyalty Redemption:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Loyalty Redemption:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Daily Maintenance Fee: ($5.00)" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Daily Maintenance Fee:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Daily Maintenance Fee:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Credit Card Fee: ($0.25)" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Credit Card Fee:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Credit Card Fee:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Tax Withheld on Cash: ($0.51)" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Tax Withheld on Cash:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Tax Withheld on Cash:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Net Total Sale: $112.70" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Net Total Sale:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Net Total Sale:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Product Commission: $5.00" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Product Commission:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Product Commission:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Service Commission: $37.62" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Service Commission:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Service Commission:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Net Commission: $42.62" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Net Commission:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Net Commission:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Net Non-Cash Tip (100.00%): $9.75" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Net Non-Cash Tip (100.00%):' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Net Non-Cash Tip (100.00%):' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Check (60.00%):  $25.57" in the single payroll view
And I should see the detail "Cash (40.00%):  $17.05" in the single payroll view
And I should see the detail "Pay 1: $35.32" in the single payroll view
And I should see the detail "Pay 2: $11.54" in the single payroll view
And I should see the detail "Total Payout: $46.86" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Total Payout:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Total Payout:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Gross Profit: $73.84" in the single payroll view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Gross Profit:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Gross Profit:' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
